summary: Iteration 184 UI verification — all 3 new changes confirmed working. (1) Client Hub cards redesigned with tier badges, gradient avatars, 3-col metric grid, 'Open profile' CTA (8/8 cards pass). (2) Dashboard + Daily Briefing merged into /advisor-command-center with data-testid='dashboard-briefing'; Decision Centre tab removed; sidebar no longer shows 'Daily Briefing' link. (3) 'View Full Analysis' on Retirement Readiness toggles inline retirement-details-panel (4 tiles) without leaving /dashboard; toggle/hide works.

issues: Footer shows next_review date value (e.g., 2026-05-15) and 'No review scheduled' fallback, but there is no explicit 'Next review' label prefix next to the date. Minor nit — the calendar icon implies date context. Not a blocker.

critical_code_review_comments: AdvisorCommandCenter.jsx still imports Tabs/TabsList/TabsTrigger/TabsContent and DecisionCenter/DailyBriefing pages even though they are no longer rendered — dead imports should be cleaned up.
AdvisorCommandCenter.jsx is 960+ lines — consider splitting MarketsStrip section, NextBestActions card, IntelligenceFeed, and the 3-col grid into sub-components (>700-line threshold).
AdviserHub.jsx client card: tier thresholds are hard-coded inline (>=20M/>=10M/>=5M) — extract to a helper for reuse/testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 184 changes validated. Client Hub has 8 household cards each with distinct tier+status combinations. Dashboard-only route at /advisor-command-center (no inner Tabs). /daily-briefing route still exists but not linked in sidebar. PersonalDashboard retirement section uses stateful toggle via showRetireDetails + data-testid='retirement-full-analysis' and data-testid='retirement-details-panel'.
